tool_args.label: Freeport station canopy roof replacement
tool_args.raw_text: a new canopy roof is coming to Freeport. Work to demolish and replace the roof began on April 3. Construction activity will be performed mostly during off-peak hours and is expected to last through the summer.

payload.description: Demolish and replace canopy roof at Freeport station. Construction during off-peak hours expected through summer 2023. Lead contractor is a graduate of MTA Small Business Mentoring Program.

tool_args.label: Massapequa Park station canopy roof replacement
tool_args.raw_text: The contract includes the same work at Massapequa Park beginning in July and continuing to the end of the year.

payload.project_name: Massapequa Park station canopy roof replacement
payload.description: Same canopy roof replacement work as Freeport, beginning in July 2023 and continuing to end of year. Same lead contractor from MTA Small Business Mentoring Program.

tool_args.label: Northport station platform construction
tool_args.raw_text: Construction work is well underway on a new twelve-car platform at Northport station. The new project will blend the old and the new, as a new ADA ramp, aluminum railings, platform shelters, and a boiler house are part of the new amenities customers will enjoy. The new platform will come equipped with a new automatic snow and ice melting system that will help Northport customers for years to come. Substantial completion of the project is estimated to be the third quarter of this year.

payload.description: Construction of new 12-car platform at Northport station with ADA ramp, aluminum railings, platform shelters, boiler house, and automatic snow and ice melting system. Substantial completion estimated for third quarter of 2023.

tool_args.label: DOT Main Line bridge replacement over Van Wyck Expressway
tool_args.raw_text: early this morning, LIRR wrapped up the second of two consecutive weekends of power, signal and track support for the DOT project to replace Main Line bridges over the Van Wyck Expressway. This portion of the program resulted in the replacement of the western half of the span. The eastern half is scheduled to be replaced over two weekends in October.

payload.project_name: DOT Main Line bridge replacement over Van Wyck Expressway
payload.description: LIRR provided power, signal and track support for DOT project to replace Main Line bridges over Van Wyck Expressway. Western half of span replaced; eastern half scheduled for replacement over two weekends in October 2023.

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.
